title: Eldoret、Uasin Gishu — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Eldoret、Uasin Gishu的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Eldoret是Uasin Gishu的一个城市，人口约475,000。A major city in the Rift Valley, known as a center for athletics and the ‘Home of Champions’ for Kenyan runners.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
